lessons.name: Review 3 (Units 7 - 9)
lessons.description: Consolidation of vocabulary and grammar from Units 7, 8, and 9.

sections.heading: I. Language - Ôn tập ngôn ngữ
sections.content:
A. Pronunciation (Phát âm)

Unit 7: Sounds /θ/ and /ð/

  • /θ/: theatre, think, three, both
  • /ð/: there, this, that, weather

Unit 8: Sounds /e/ and /æ/

  • /e/: tennis, chess, exercise, get
  • /æ/: badminton, match, racket, active

Unit 9: Sounds /əʊ/ and /aʊ/

  • /əʊ/: Rome, Tokyo, old, cold
  • /aʊ/: tower, crowded, house, town

B. Vocabulary (Từ vựng)

Unit 7: Television

  • TV programmes: cartoon, news, game show, comedy, documentary, sports programme
  • People on TV: viewer, MC, comedian, newsreader, weatherman/weathergirl
  • TV equipment: television, remote control, screen, channel
  • Adjectives: interesting, boring, exciting, funny, educational, entertaining

Unit 8: Sports and Games

  • Sports: football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, tennis, swimming, cycling, running
  • Equipment: ball, racket, bat, net, goal, bicycle, skateboard
  • Verbs: play, go, do, win, lose, score, kick, throw, catch, hit
  • Places: stadium, gym, swimming pool, sports centre, playground

Unit 9: Cities of the World

  • Places: city, capital, country, continent, tower, bridge, palace, statue, landmark
  • Famous cities: London, Paris, New York, Tokyo, Sydney, Rome
  • Famous landmarks: Big Ben, Eiffel Tower, Statue of Liberty, Sydney Opera House
  • Adjectives: famous, exciting, crowded, busy, peaceful, modern, ancient

C. Grammar (Ngữ pháp)

Unit 7: Wh-questions

  • Question words: What, Where, When, Who, Why, How, Which
  • Structure: Wh-word + do/does + S + V? / Wh-word + is/are + S?
  • Ex: What do you watch? / When is the programme?

Unit 7: Conjunctions

  • and: và (nối hai ý tương đương)
  • but: nhưng (nối hai ý đối lập)
  • or: hoặc (nối hai lựa chọn)
  • so: vì vậy (chỉ kết quả)
  • because: bởi vì (chỉ nguyên nhân)
  • although: mặc dù (chỉ sự nhượng bộ)

Unit 8: Past Simple

  • Regular verbs: V + ed (played, watched, studied)
  • Irregular verbs: go→went, win→won, have→had
  • Negative: S + didn't + V
  • Question: Did + S + V?
  • Time expressions: yesterday, last week, ago, in 2020

Unit 8: Imperatives

  • Positive: V (Run faster!)
  • Negative: Don't + V (Don't run!)
  • Polite: Please + V (Please sit down.)

Unit 9: Possessive Adjectives and Pronouns

  • Possessive Adjectives: my, your, his, her, its, our, their + noun
  • Ex: This is my city.
  • Possessive Pronouns: mine, yours, his, hers, ours, theirs (đứng một mình)
  • Ex: This city is mine.

sections.heading: II. Skills - Ôn tập kỹ năng
sections.content:
A. Reading (Đọc hiểu)

Kỹ năng cần ôn tập:

  • Đọc lướt để nắm ý chính (skimming)
  • Đọc kỹ để tìm thông tin chi tiết (scanning)
  • Đoán nghĩa từ vựng qua ngữ cảnh
  • Hiểu ý chính của đoạn văn
  • Xác định thông tin đúng/sai
  • Trả lời câu hỏi về bài đọc

Chủ đề đã đọc:

  • TV programmes and viewing habits
  • Sports and games
  • Famous cities and landmarks

B. Speaking (Nói)

Chủ đề đã học:

  • Talking about TV programmes
  • Discussing sports and games
  • Describing cities and landmarks
  • Asking and answering Wh-questions

Useful expressions:

  • What do you watch on TV?
  • I like... because... / I don't like... but...
  • Did you watch the match? / Who won?
  • What sport do you play?
  • What's your favourite city?
  • My city is... / Mine is...

C. Listening (Nghe hiểu)

Kỹ năng cần ôn tập:

  • Nghe để nắm ý chính
  • Nghe để tìm thông tin cụ thể
  • Điền thông tin còn thiếu (gap-filling)
  • Trả lời câu hỏi chi tiết
  • Hiểu mô tả và hướng dẫn

Chủ đề đã nghe:

  • TV schedules and programmes
  • Sports events and matches
  • Travel guides about cities

D. Writing (Viết)

Dạng bài đã học:

  • Writing about TV habits
  • Writing about sports events
  • Writing postcards from cities

Kỹ năng viết:

  • Tổ chức bài viết: Introduction - Body - Conclusion
  • Sử dụng Wh-questions để đặt câu hỏi
  • Sử dụng conjunctions để nối câu
  • Sử dụng Past Simple để kể về quá khứ
  • Sử dụng imperatives để ra lệnh, hướng dẫn
  • Sử dụng possessive adjectives/pronouns để chỉ sở hữu
  • Viết câu rõ ràng và mạch lạc

Cấu trúc bài viết mẫu:

  • Introduction: Giới thiệu chủ đề (1-2 câu)
  • Body: Trình bày chi tiết (3-5 câu)
  • Conclusion: Kết luận (1 câu)

problemTypes.name: Mixed Exercise
problemTypes.method: Review all grammar points and vocabulary from Units 7-9.

exercises.passage:
My name is Tom and I love watching television. My favourite programme is a game show called 'Who Wants to Win?'. It's on Channel 5 every Saturday evening. I like it because it's very exciting and educational. The MC is very funny and the questions are interesting.

I also like watching sports programmes, but my sister doesn't. She prefers cartoons and comedies. Yesterday, we watched a football match together. Our team won 3-1. It was amazing! After the match, we watched a comedy. Although it was late, we enjoyed it very much.

I don't like news programmes because they are boring. My parents watch the news every evening, but I usually do my homework or play games during that time.

questions.question: What is Tom's favourite programme?
questions.explanation: Tom's favourite programme is a game show called 'Who Wants to Win?'.

questions.question: When is the game show on TV?
questions.explanation: The game show is on every Saturday evening.

questions.question: Why does Tom like the game show?
questions.explanation: Tom likes it because it's very exciting and educational.

questions.question: What did Tom and his sister watch yesterday?
options: A football match and a comedy
questions.explanation: They watched a football match and then a comedy.

questions.question: What does Tom do when his parents watch the news?
options: He does homework or plays games
questions.explanation: Tom usually does his homework or plays games during that time.

exercises.passage:
Last weekend, I went to London with my family. London is the capital of England and it's one of the most famous cities in the world. We visited many interesting places.

On Saturday, we saw Big Ben and the Tower Bridge. Big Ben is a famous clock tower and it's very tall. The Tower Bridge is beautiful, especially at night. We took many photos there. My favourite place was Buckingham Palace. It's where the Queen lives. The palace is very big and beautiful.

On Sunday, we went to a sports centre. I played football with my brother. He is very good at football, so his team won. Although I lost, I enjoyed the game very much. After that, we went shopping. My mother bought some souvenirs. Mine was a small model of Big Ben.

London is an exciting city. I want to visit it again.

questions.question: Where did the writer go last weekend?
questions.explanation: The writer went to London last weekend.

questions.question: What is Big Ben?
questions.explanation: Big Ben is a famous clock tower.

questions.question: What is the writer's favourite place?
questions.explanation: The writer's favourite place was Buckingham Palace.

questions.question: What did the writer do on Sunday?
questions.explanation: On Sunday, the writer played football and went shopping.

questions.question: What souvenir did the writer buy?
questions.explanation: The writer bought a small model of Big Ben.

exercises.question: ______ do you watch on TV?
exercises.explanation: Hỏi về vật (chương trình) → dùng 'What'.

exercises.question: I like cartoons ______ comedies.
exercises.explanation: Nối hai ý tương đương → dùng 'and'.

exercises.question: I like this show ______ it's funny.
exercises.explanation: Chỉ nguyên nhân → dùng 'because'.

exercises.question: I ______ football yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Có 'yesterday' → Past Simple. Play + ed → played.

exercises.question: She ______ swimming last week.
exercises.explanation: Có 'last week' → Past Simple. Go (bất quy tắc) → went.

exercises.question: ______ you watch the match?
exercises.explanation: Câu hỏi ở quá khứ đơn: Did + S + V?

exercises.question: ______ faster!
exercises.explanation: Câu mệnh lệnh: V (nguyên mẫu).

exercises.question: ______ play in the street!
exercises.explanation: Câu mệnh lệnh phủ định: Don't + V.

exercises.question: This is ______ city.
exercises.explanation: Tính từ sở hữu đứng trước danh từ → my.

exercises.question: This city is ______.
exercises.explanation: Đại từ sở hữu đứng một mình → mine.

exercises.question: ______ country is beautiful.
exercises.explanation: Tính từ sở hữu đứng trước danh từ → Her.

exercises.question: That book is ______.
exercises.explanation: Đại từ sở hữu đứng một mình → yours.

exercises.question: The programme is boring, ______ I don't watch it.
exercises.explanation: Chỉ kết quả → dùng 'so'.

exercises.question: ______ the film is long, it's interesting.
exercises.explanation: Chỉ sự nhượng bộ → dùng 'Although'.

exercises.question: I ______ play football yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Phủ định ở quá khứ đơn: didn't + V.

exercises.question: I ______ football every day.
exercises.explanation: Football là ball sport → dùng 'play'.

exercises.question: She ______ swimming on Sundays.
exercises.explanation: Swimming là -ing sport → dùng 'go'.

exercises.question: ______ is your favourite MC?
exercises.explanation: Hỏi về người → dùng 'Who'.

exercises.question: London is famous ______ Big Ben.
exercises.explanation: Famous for: nổi tiếng về...

exercises.question: Our team ______ the match yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Có 'yesterday' → Past Simple. Win (bất quy tắc) → won.

exercises.question_text: Wh-questions are used to ask for information.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. Câu hỏi Wh- dùng để hỏi thông tin.
Sai. 'Because' chỉ nguyên nhân, 'so' chỉ kết quả.

exercises.question_text: Past Simple is used for actions that happened in the past.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. Thì quá khứ đơn dùng cho hành động đã xảy ra trong quá khứ.
Sai. 'Please' làm câu mệnh lệnh lịch sự hơn nhưng không bắt buộc.

exercises.question_text: Possessive pronouns stand alone without a noun.
exercises.explanation: Đúng. Đại từ sở hữu đứng một mình, không cần danh từ theo sau.

exercises.question_text: What question word do we use to ask about time? (one word)
exercises.explanation: When: dùng để hỏi về thời gian.

exercises.question_text: What is the past form of 'go'? (one word)
exercises.explanation: Go (bất quy tắc) → went.

exercises.question_text: Complete: This is ______ book. (I - possessive adjective)
exercises.explanation: I → my (tính từ sở hữu).

exercises.question_text: What conjunction means 'although' in English? (one word)
exercises.explanation: Although: mặc dù (chỉ sự nhượng bộ).

exercises.question_text: Write a short paragraph (50-70 words) about your TV habits. Use Wh-questions and conjunctions.
exercises.sample_answer: I love watching television. My favourite programme is a game show because it's very exciting. I watch TV every evening after dinner. I usually watch cartoons and comedies, but I don't like news programmes. My brother likes sports programmes, so we sometimes watch football matches together. Although we have different tastes, we enjoy watching TV together. What do you like watching on TV?
exercises.explanation: Bài viết sử dụng: Wh-questions (What do you like watching?), Conjunctions (because, but, so, although), Present Simple tense.

exercises.question_text: Write a short paragraph (50-70 words) about a sports event you watched or played. Use Past Simple and imperatives.
exercises.sample_answer: Last Saturday, I played football with my friends at the sports centre. Our team played very well. I scored two goals and we won 4-2. It was amazing! My coach said, 'Run faster! Pass the ball!' We followed his instructions. After the match, he said, 'Well done! Don't give up!' I was very happy. Although I was tired, I enjoyed the game very much. I want to play again next weekend.
exercises.explanation: Bài viết sử dụng: Past Simple (played, scored, won, was, said, followed, enjoyed), Imperatives (Run faster! Pass the ball! Don't give up!), Conjunctions (Although).

exercises.question_text: Write a short paragraph (50-70 words) about your favourite city. Use possessive adjectives and pronouns.
exercises.sample_answer: My favourite city is Paris. It's the capital of France. Paris is famous for the Eiffel Tower. My dream is to visit it one day. My sister's favourite city is London, but mine is Paris. I think Paris is more beautiful than other cities. Its landmarks are amazing. My parents visited Paris last year. Their photos are wonderful. I hope our family can go there together soon.
exercises.explanation: Bài viết sử dụng: Possessive adjectives (My favourite, My dream, My sister's, Its landmarks, Their photos, our family), Possessive pronouns (mine), Comparative adjectives (more beautiful than).

exercises.question_text: Write a short paragraph (50-70 words) combining topics from Units 7-9. Use various grammar structures.
exercises.sample_answer: Last weekend was amazing! On Saturday, I watched a sports programme on TV. My favourite team won the match 3-1. I was very excited because they played very well. On Sunday, my family went to the city centre. We visited the museum and took many photos. My brother's camera is better than mine, so his photos are clearer. Although we were tired, we enjoyed our weekend very much. What did you do last weekend?
exercises.explanation: Bài viết kết hợp: Past Simple (watched, won, was, played, went, visited, took, were, enjoyed, did), Conjunctions (because, so, although), Possessive adjectives/pronouns (My favourite, My brother's, mine), Wh-questions (What did you do?), Comparative adjectives (better than, clearer).
